//Identity: GitHub sign-in + optional allowlist. CLIENT SECRET in user-secrets, NOT here. Callback https://localhost:8210/api/identity/callback (dev). Empty ClientId/ClientSecret => host boots, /health works, sign-in returns 503 until set. AllowedGitHubLogins EMPTY => OPEN (any GitHub user, self-hosted); populate ONLY to lock an exposed instance (others get 403).
